title: Getting Started
summary: Current repository state, how to run DeltaCore, and how this portal relates to the product.
sidebarNote: Welcome to Mission Control — the engineering knowledge base for DeltaCore.

blocks.heading: Welcome
blocks.content: DeltaCore is an industrial intelligence platform for mining, construction, fleet, plant hire and logistics. This portal documents vision, architecture, standards and roadmap. The product source code lives in a private repository; this public site contains documentation only.

blocks.heading: Current state
blocks.content: The solution is an AppGen-scaffolded ASP.NET Core foundation with PostgreSQL, REST API, MVC admin UI, and core domain entities (Company, Mine, Site, Equipment, Fuel, Alerts, Users).
bullets: M1 foundation: database schema, authentication data model, CRUD API and MVC — in progress / live
Telemetry ingestion, fuel analytics engine, and production AI — planned
Existing POC: Streamlit dashboard on GitHub (DeltaCoreAI org) — separate from this .NET foundation

blocks.heading: Portal vs MVC vs API
bullets: DeltaCore.API — platform backend and REST endpoints
DeltaCore.MVC — operational admin (equipment, alerts, fuel events)
Engineering Portal (this site) — vision, architecture, standards for sharing
